## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tony (LXMI Capital) and Marcel (fwd.digital) to discuss progress on their joint venture, Elite Hire.](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI-powered prototyping tools enable rapid development of complex features (e.g., recruiting pipeline, forecasting tool)](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Setting up financial infrastructure: Ramp card access pending, considering Mercury for streamlined banking/invoicing](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Recruitment strategy: Plan to secure a client before hiring, leveraging Sarah's network for cost-effective talent ($1000/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

## Topics

### AI-Powered Prototyping Demo

  - [Marcel showcased rapid prototyping capabilities using AI tools:](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Recruiting pipeline with video upload filtering](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Financial forecasting tool with dynamic scenario building](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - ["Wishpanda" app with Google sign-in, database integration, and live page creation](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Highlights efficiency: \~30 mins work for complex, functional prototypes](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Potential to streamline development process and improve initial product experiences](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Financial Setup for Elite Hire

  - [Ramp credit card approved, bank account opened](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - Tony to add Marcel (<marcel@elitehire.com>) to Ramp account
  - [Considering switch to Mercury for banking:](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Offers integrated invoicing, tech-forward features](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [$2,500 minimum deposit, instant virtual card issuance](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Referral offer: $250 bonus each for $10k deposit in 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Tony to complete Mercury signup process](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Recruitment Strategy

  - [Plan: Secure client before hiring to minimize financial risk](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Sarah (contact) insights on recruitment:](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Easy to find talent due to low pay ($800/mo) at competitors like Oceans](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Potential to attract quality candidates (e.g., Masters in Project Management) with modest pay increase ($1000/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [Local management issues at competitors creating opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Proposed model:](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [Cost: $1000/mo per hire](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [Revenue: $3000/mo (matching Athena pricing)](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [Margin allows for basic expenses and gradual scaling](https://fathom.video/share/1zCL2Vk95EtRcxtxegPXCAAq3aU_oMQ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
